title: How Case Managers Can Place Section 8 Clients in Cleveland Faster
metaTitle: Place Section 8 Clients Faster in Cleveland | Housing Partners
metaDescription: A practical guide for Cleveland case managers and housing navigators: how to place Housing Choice Voucher clients faster with landlords who already welcome Section 8.
answerBox: The slowest part of placing a Housing Choice Voucher client is usually finding a landlord who will accept the voucher at all. You can skip that step by working from a pool of homes that already welcome Section 8 and are HUD-inspection-ready. Rent Finder Cleveland works with 90+ such homes across Greater Cleveland — send a client's needs and we'll tell you what's available now.

sections.h2: Start from landlords who already say yes
body: Many voucher denials never show up as denials — a landlord simply stops replying, or lists a rent just above the payment standard. Beginning with homes that already accept Housing Choice Vouchers removes that friction so your client's search starts from **yes**.
Every home we work with welcomes Section 8 and is ready for a CMHA HQS inspection, which is often where placements stall.

sections.h2: What to send us to speed up a match
body: The more specific the request, the faster we can point you to real options.

items: Preferred neighborhoods or must-be-near locations (work, school, clinic)
Move-in timing and any inspection deadlines
Voucher bedroom size and issuing housing authority (e.g. CMHA)

body: Cleveland itself does not yet have a source-of-income ordinance, but several inner-ring suburbs do — including Cleveland Heights, South Euclid, University Heights, Warrensville Heights, and Linndale. We welcome vouchers everywhere we operate regardless, and we follow the Fair Housing Act in every interaction.

faq.q: Is there any cost to work with you as a case manager?
faq.a: No. There is no fee to partner with us or refer a client. The renter still completes standard tenant application steps once they choose a home.

faq.q: How quickly can you tell me what's available?
faq.a: Usually same day. Because every home we work with already accepts Housing Choice Vouchers, we can quickly match a client's bedrooms, timing, and preferred areas to what's open right now.
